data.title: Bitcoin near $121,000; analyst warns of potential corrections citing sell signals, past drops of 7% and 13%.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently priced around $121,000 and its daily chart is showing warning signs of potential corrections. Crypto analyst Ali Martinez pointed out that the TD Sequential indicator has signaled a sell, indicating possible pullbacks. For instance, a sell signal on July 14 was followed by a 7% decrease, and one on Aug. 13 led to a 13% decline. These signs suggest that Bitcoin may be overbought and could experience a significant correction soon. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin is at $121,000, showing 'warning signs'; TD Sequential indicator suggests past pullbacks.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading close to $121,000, and analysts are flagging concerning signals on its daily chart that could indicate an imminent correction. Crypto chart analyst Ali Martinez pointed out that the TD Sequential indicator has given a sell signal, a pattern that has historically foreshadowed significant pullbacks. Previous instances include a 7% drop following a sell signal on July 14 and a 13% decline after a signal on Aug. 13. This suggests that Bitcoin may be overbought and due for a correction in the near future. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: U.S. foreclosure activity rises in Q3 2025 - 16% increase in foreclosure starts and 33% increase in bank repossessions.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, foreclosure starts in the United States saw a 16% annual increase, while bank repossessions were up by 33% compared to the previous year. This data was disclosed by ATTOM, a prominent provider of land, property, and real estate information, based in Irvine, California. These figures indicate a concerning trend in the housing market, suggesting potential financial difficulties for homeowners.

data.title: Former US DOE official Tala Goudarzi joins Torridon Group LLC after serving as Principal Deputy Assistant Secretary of FECM.
data.description: In a recent press release on October 9, 2025, The Torridon Group LLC revealed that Tala Goudarzi, the ex-Principal Deputy Assistant Secretary and Acting Assistant Secretary of the Office of Fossil Energy and Carbon Management (FECM) at the U.S. Department of Energy, will be joining their team.

data.title: Bitcoin's role in the "debasement trade" as investors hedge against a weaker dollar is more narrative than reality. #cryptocurrency #bitcoin
data.description: Investors are turning to Bitcoin as a hedge against the weakening dollar, a trend known as the "debasement trade." However, the actual impact of Bitcoin in this regard is more of a storyline than a concrete reality.

data.title: Citizens Financial upgraded by BofA Securities analyst, price target raised to $65 from $52. Anticipates ROTCE to reach 14.6% by 2028, one of the largest gains in bank coverage.
data.description: A financial analyst at BofA Securities, Ebrahim H. Poonawala, has upgraded Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG) from Neutral to Buy, along with increasing the price target from $52 to $65. The stock for CFG is currently trading at heightened levels. According to the analyst, there is an estimated improvement of 300 basis points or more in ROTCE (Return on Tangible Common Equity) by 2028, which would bring it to 14.6%. This is noted as one of the most significant increases within its super-regional bank coverage. Poonawala anticipates that the ROTCE will see positive impact from the termination of swaps, resulting in a 21 basis points increase to NIM through 2027. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
